creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Took some time to try poudriere builds and tests (default options only, stable/14, amd64).

# poudriere bulk -O sccache -j [jailname] -J 6 [portname]

generated pkg. (Not installed.)


# poudriere testport -O sccache -j [jailname] -J 6 -N [portname]

showed some errors and warnings. Fixed not yet uploaded monolithic patch for errors.
A warning below is remaining as below for sysutils/zogftw, but it is unrelated with my patch.

=======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
===== env: DEVELOPER_MODE=yes DEVELOPER=1 STRICT_DEPENDS=yes USER=root UID=0 GID=0
/!\ zogftw-0.0.2022.06.25_1: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please set LICENSE for this port

===========================================================================
